text: The subject is located in a condo development on the eastside of Bloomington, IL. It is a one-story flat designed condominum unit. It conforms to most other existing condo units in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Oakland Ave, to the South by Lincoln St, to the East by Veterans Pkwy, and to the West by Mercer Ave.
